svg.text: Cartridge Tray Rear Wall + Floor Wire Routing — Third-Angle Orthographic Projection
Material: PETG | All dimensions in mm | Scale noted per view

g.text: FRONT VIEW (looking along -Y, rear wall exterior)
DETAIL C: Rear Wall Section at T1
Scale: 10 px/mm — Section cut at X=25
1. All terminal retention slots are friction-fit (no latches).
4. Wire channels (green) recessed 2mm below Z=3 floor.
7. 0.5mm slot side walls (6.3mm type) below FDM minimum
Wire from pump motor tabs, through floor channels,
through rear wall pass-throughs, crimp terminals
seat in retention slots on exterior face.
